chk_payments_no_sale_and_purchase.name: chk_payments_no_sale_and_purchase
chk_payments_no_sale_and_purchase.value: NOT ("payments"."sale_id" IS NOT NULL AND "payments"."purchase_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_payments_no_customer_and_supplier.name: chk_payments_no_customer_and_supplier
chk_payments_no_customer_and_supplier.value: NOT ("payments"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL AND "payments"."supplier_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_payments_no_sale_and_supplier.name: chk_payments_no_sale_and_supplier
chk_payments_no_sale_and_supplier.value: NOT ("payments"."sale_id" IS NOT NULL AND "payments"."supplier_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_payments_no_purchase_and_customer.name: chk_payments_no_purchase_and_customer
chk_payments_no_purchase_and_customer.value: NOT ("payments"."purchase_id" IS NOT NULL AND "payments"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_payments_has_context.name: chk_payments_has_context
chk_payments_has_context.value: ("payments"."sale_id" IS NOT NULL OR "payments"."purchase_id" IS NOT NULL OR "payments"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL OR "payments"."supplier_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_batches_expiry_after_manufacture.name: chk_batches_expiry_after_manufacture
chk_batches_expiry_after_manufacture.value: "product_batches"."expiry_date" IS NULL OR "product_batches"."manufacturing_date" IS NULL OR "product_batches"."expiry_date" >= "product_batches"."manufacturing_date"
